summary: Classified the Telegram ACP direct-message binding PRs in read-only plan mode. #91408 should be the live canonical because it covers the same root cause as #68537, is non-draft, has supplied/sufficient proof, and has passing direct real-behavior proof. #68537 remains related overlap rather than a closure recommendation because it is an open contributor PR with useful code and #91408 still needs maintainer review before any merge path.

actions.reason: Best surviving canonical PR for the shared Telegram ACP direct-message binding root cause; merge is not planned because merge is blocked by job frontmatter and merge preflight is incomplete.
